parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, source: (($('On Webhook Trigger').first().json.body.type === 1 || $('On Webhook Trigger').first().json.body.type === '1') ? ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, source: (($('On Webhook Trigger').first().json.body.type === 1 || $('On Webhook Trigger').first().json.body.type === '1') ? meta.notes: Unified workflow supporting both Google Maps and LinkedIn lead generation based on payload.source ("google_maps"|"linkedin"). Use /webhook/gims-leads with JSON body { source, keyword, city, limit, lead_source_id, erp_base_url }
